Serialized Form

  • Package com.example.battleship.game

    • Class com.example.battleship.game.GameManager

      class GameManager extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • human
          HumanPlayer human
          Human player instance.
        • humanTurn
          boolean humanTurn
          Indicates whether it is currently the human player's turn.
        • machine
          MachinePlayer machine
          Machine (AI) player instance.
        • nickname
          String nickname
          Player's nickname.
        • revealedSunkenShips
          Set<Ship> revealedSunkenShips
          Set of enemy ships that have been revealed as sunken on the view board.

  • Package com.example.battleship.model

    • Class com.example.battleship.model.Board

      class Board extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • board
          Map<Coordinate,Cell> board
          Map holding all grid coordinates and their corresponding cell states.
        • fleet
          Fleet fleet
          Fleet of ships assigned to this board.

    • Class com.example.battleship.model.Cell

      class Cell extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • cellState
          CellState cellState
          Current state of the cell.
        • coordinate
          Coordinate coordinate
          Grid coordinate of this cell.
        • ship
          Ship ship
          Reference to the ship assigned to this cell, if any.

    • Class com.example.battleship.model.Coordinate

      class Coordinate extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • col
          int col
          Zero-indexed column coordinate (0–9).
        • row
          int row
          Zero-indexed row coordinate (0–9).

    • Class com.example.battleship.model.Fleet

      class Fleet extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • ships
          List<Ship> ships
          Active list of ships assigned to this fleet.

    • Class com.example.battleship.model.HuntTargetStrategy

      class HuntTargetStrategy extends Object implements Serializable

      • Serialization Methods

        • readObject
          private void readObject(ObjectInputStream in) throws IOException, ClassNotFoundException
          Custom deserialization logic to restore non-serializable fields (e.g. Random).
          Parameters:
          in - ObjectInputStream instance.
          Throws:
          IOException - If an I/O error occurs.
          ClassNotFoundException - If the class cannot be located.

      • Serialized Fields

        • hitCoordinates
          Set<Coordinate> hitCoordinates
          Set tracking coordinates that successfully scored a HIT on the current unsunk vessel.
        • mode
          ShootingMode mode
          Current operational shooting state (HUNT or TARGET).
        • shotCoordinates
          Set<Coordinate> shotCoordinates
          Set tracking all coordinates targeted in previous turns.
        • targetCoordinates
          Deque<Coordinate> targetCoordinates
          Queue of high-priority target coordinates queued during TARGET mode.

  • Package com.example.battleship.model.exceptions

    • Exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.InvalidCoordinateException

      class InvalidCoordinateException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • col
          int col
          Column index that caused the exception.
        • row
          int row
          Row index that caused the exception.

    • Exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.InvalidShipSizeException

      class InvalidShipSizeException extends RuntimeException implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • sizeCells
          int sizeCells
          The actual number of cells provided for the ship.
        • sizeShip
          int sizeShip
          The expected size of the ship in cells.

    • Exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.RepeatedShotException

      class RepeatedShotException extends Exception implements Serializable

      • Serialized Fields

        • cellState
          CellState cellState
          The state of the targeted cell that triggered the exception.

    • Exception com.example.battleship.model.exceptions.ShipOverLapException

      class ShipOverLapException extends Exception implements Serializable

        • random
          Random random
          Random number generator used for automated fleet setup.

          AI shooting strategy responsible for target selection.

      class Ship extends Object implements Serializable
      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • cells
          List<Cell> cells
          List of grid cells occupied by this ship.
        • orientation
          Orientation orientation
          The layout orientation (HORIZONTAL or VERTICAL) of the ship.
        • size
          int size
          The length of the ship in grid cells.
